import'../../styles/Main.css';import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[scaleMessage,setScaleMessage]=useState(null);const[lastScaleWeight,setLastWeight]=useState(null);const[diff,setDiff]=useState(null);const[forkMessage,setForkMessage]=useState(null);const[cutCount,setCutCount]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{let ws;const connectWebSocket=()=>{ws=new WebSocket("ws://dex.local:8765");ws.onopen=()=>{console.log("Connected to sensor WebSocket");};ws.onmessage=event=>{const data=JSON.parse(event.data);if(data.source==="scale"){setScaleMessage(data.message);setLastWeight(data.lastWeight);setDiff(data.diff);}else if(data.source==="fork"){setForkMessage(data.message);setCutCount(data.cutCount);}else{console.log("ERROR");}};ws.onerror=err=>{console.error("WebSocket error:",err);};ws.onclose=()=>{console.warn("WebSocket closed, retrying in 1 second...");setTimeout(connectWebSocket,1000);};};connectWebSocket();return()=>ws&&ws.close();},[]);const startSensors=()=>{console.log("Pressed ");//start all sensors to read from loadSensor.py
